content_body:
Cabin Rentals of Georgia, 4th & Swift Restaurant, and the founders of the Blue Ridge Chamber Music Festival team up for THE ULTIMATE BLUE RIDGE EXPERIENCE!

PURCHASE TICKETS HERE

Join us as one of 40 special guests to enjoy an intimate chamber music concert and an Appalachian-inspired feast. The Blue Ridge Supper Club promises an exciting concert and dining experience like no other, featuring chef/restaurateur Jay Swift (whom Travel+Leisure Magazine calls one of "the Southeast's best chefs") and internationally acclaimed musicians Scott Flavin, Margaret Donaghue Flavin, and Jana Young (who have performed in Carnegie Hall, with major orchestras in the U.S., and multiple venues throughout Europe), and Lissa Knight, piano (owner of Cabin Rentals of Georgia).   Trust us, you don’t want to miss it!

This exclusive event will take place at 5:00 PM on Saturday, October 18, 2014, seated in the elegantly private Royal Mountain Lodge (the exact address will be on the tickets). This elegant, rustic lodge offers stunning October sunsets over the Blue Ridge Mountains and Lake Blue Ridge, the perfect backdrop to the evening. You’ll enjoy exquisite cuisine and extraordinary performances for a night you’ll never forget! Seating is limited, so call our office at 706-632-2246 for more information, or buy your tickets here.

ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

MENU FOR THE EVENING:

Hors D’oeuvres

Smoked Bramlett Farms Rainbow Trout, Horseradish, Toasted Brioche, Garden Herbs
Cornmeal Fried Quail, English Mustard Sauce, Cress
Local Field Pea Hummus, Toasted Cumin Cracker Bread
Champagne

Dinner
Early Fall Vegetable Minestrone, Fregola, Mushroom Ricotta, Crispy Heritage Pork
Chardonnay

Bitter Greens, Brussels Sprouts, Pecans, Crispy Shallots, Warm Goat Cheese Dressing
Pinot Noir

Wood-Grilled Eye of Ribeye, Sunchoke Puree, Fried Rapini, Olive Gremolata
Cabernet or Rhone

Symphony of Southern Desserts
Sticky Toffee Pudding
Coffee/Port

TICKETING INFORMATION:

Tickets are $125/person ($130.37 w/ service fee)

Seating is limited to 40 guests.

Click here to buy tickets for the Blue Ridge Supper Club Chamber Music Gala online.
title: Blue Ridge Supper Club: An Exclusive Blue Ridge Dining Experience
